general: A half-elf cleric of the Morninglord, carrying a sunburst holy symbol and a heavy conscience. He fled his temple after a vision of death and found himself in Barovia. He believes the Morninglord sent him here to bring light to this dark place, but his faith is fraying.
location: Village of Barovia — Blood on the Vine

personality.traits: Compassionate, introspective, conflicted, devout, gentle, prone to melancholy.
personality.details: Marek was a respected acolyte in the temple of the Morninglord in Daggerford. Three nights ago, he had a waking vision: a land of mist, a castle of shadows, and a voice whispering 'come'. He left that night and walked into the mists. Now he wonders if his god led him here to die.

appearance.base: A lean half-elf in his early thirties with pale skin, tired amber eyes, and shoulder-length dark hair tied back. He wears tattered priestly robes over chainmail. A sunburst amulet rests on his chest. His hands are steady but his eyes betray exhaustion.

skills.base: Cleric (level 5) — Domain of Light. Spells: Cure Wounds, Guiding Bolt, Bless, Spiritual Weapon, Turn Undead. Proficient in mace, scale mail, religion, medicine.

equipment.base: Mace, chainmail, shield, holy symbol (sunburst of the Morninglord), priest's pack, healer's kit, journal with half-filled pages.
